content: Illustrative MSCI-style issuer credit assessment for The Southern Company, dated 2025-11-16 on Q3 fundamentals as of 2025-09-30. This assessment sits between the two anchors at BBB, applying a partial sector overlay rather than a full parent-support uplift. All three assessments share the same fresh leverage input; the notch spread reflects differing methodology treatments of group support and sector risk.
